response: Christopher Nolan’s 2023 drama/history film *Oppenheimer*, which has a 180-minute runtime and a $100 million production budget, won the Academy Award for Best Picture. The film was a runaway critical and commercial success, grossing $952 million at the global box office, earning an 8.3 rating on IMDB, and securing a 93% fresh score on Rotten Tomatoes.
